data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of being weather-dependent with a cancellation policy. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the cancellation policy is operationally enforced in the system. While the use case mentions that guests can reschedule or get a refund in case of severe weather, there is no concrete evidence showing how this is implemented or verified in the API or system state, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the operational enforcement of the weather-dependent cancellation policy.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the weather-dependent cancellation policy.
